name: @kobzi/gmfetch
description: Drop-in fetch() replacement for userscripts, backed by GM_xmlhttpRequest. Bypasses CORS, forbidden headers, and cookie restrictions.
author: Kobzi

scripts.build: npm run build:full && npm run build:lite && npm run build:micro && npm run build:types && npm run compress
scripts.compress: terser dist/gmFetch.esm.min.js -o dist/gmFetch.esm.min.js -c passes=3,pure_getters=true,unsafe=true,toplevel=true -m toplevel=true && terser dist/gmFetch.iife.min.js -o dist/gmFetch.iife.min.js -c passes=3,pure_getters=true,unsafe=true -m && terser dist/gmFetch.lite.esm.min.js -o dist/gmFetch.lite.esm.min.js -c passes=3,pure_getters=true,unsafe=true,toplevel=true -m toplevel=true && terser dist/gmFetch.lite.iife.min.js -o dist/gmFetch.lite.iife.min.js -c passes=3,pure_getters=true,unsafe=true -m && terser dist/gmFetch.micro.esm.min.js -o dist/gmFetch.micro.esm.min.js -c passes=3,pure_getters=true,unsafe=true,toplevel=true -m toplevel=true && terser dist/gmFetch.micro.iife.min.js -o dist/gmFetch.micro.iife.min.js -c passes=3,pure_getters=true,unsafe=true -m
